title: RTLIL doesn't differentiate between simple bits and [0:0]

features.name: single-bit range port vs plain 1-bit port
features.description: Code should include a port declaration with explicit single-bit range [0:0] and a plain 1-bit port, where the tool loses the distinction in output
features.snippet:
module top(input [0:0] a, input b);
endmodule
